potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall allow customers to cancel their reservation.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The objectives of this case study consist of providing a web-based bus ticket reservation function where a customer can buy a bus ticket through the online system without a need to queue up at the counter to purchase a bus ticket, enabling customers to check the availability and types of buses online.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall provide a web-based bus ticket reservation function.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Customer can check the time departure for every Indian Tourist Centre (ITC) bus through the system, easing bus ticket payment by obtaining a bank pin after payments is made to the various designated banks, the ability of customers to cancel their reservation, admin user privileges in updating and cancelling payment, route and vehicle records.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall enable customers to check the time departure for every Indian Tourist Centre (ITC) bus.
